info.description: Fetch account transaction history with optional filters for signer, success status, and sort order.
info.title: Transactions API - Account History

fields.description: NEAR account to query transactions for (may be a signer, predecessor, receiver, or related party).
fields.label: Account ID
fields.name: account_id

schema.description: NEAR account to query transactions for (may be a signer, predecessor, receiver, or related party).

fields.description: Sort newest-first when true; oldest-first when false or omitted.
fields.label: Desc
fields.name: desc

schema.description: Sort newest-first when true; oldest-first when false or omitted.

fields.description: Inclusive lower bound on the transaction's block height.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account appeared in action arguments.

fields.name: is_action_arg

schema.description: Restrict to transactions where this account appeared in action arguments.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account signed either the top-level transaction or a delegated action.

schema.description: Restrict to transactions where this account signed either the top-level transaction or a delegated action.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account was the target of a function-call action.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account was the predecessor of a receipt.

fields.name: is_predecessor

schema.description: Restrict to transactions where this account was the predecessor of a receipt.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account was the real receiver — excluding relayer receivers and gas refunds.
fields.label: Is Real Receiver
fields.name: is_real_receiver

schema.description: Restrict to transactions where this account was the real receiver — excluding relayer receivers and gas refunds.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions where this account signed the top-level transaction.

schema.description: Restrict to transactions where this account signed the top-level transaction.

fields.description: Restrict to transactions whose execution succeeded (true) or failed/pending (false).

info.description: Fetch a block row by height or hash and optionally expand its transactions and receipts.

info.title: Transactions API - Block Lookup

fields.label: Block ID
fields.name: block_id

schema.description: Block height (integer) or base58-encoded block hash (string) to fetch.

fields.description: Include the block's receipts in the response when true.
fields.label: With Receipts
fields.name: with_receipts

schema.description: Include the block's receipts in the response when true.

fields.description: Include the block's transactions in the response when true.

fields.name: with_transactions

schema.description: Include the block's transactions in the response when true.
Block height (integer) or base58-encoded block hash (string) to fetch.
